source_jobs.title: Head of Sales
source_jobs.description:
About Sybill:

B2B AEs spend only 1.5 hours a day on customer calls—the rest is wasted in back-office admin work. Sybill automates away this drudgery, empowering sales reps to focus on what matters most: building relationships and closing deals.

We don’t just take meeting notes—Sybill automatically creates and manages to-do lists from both calls and emails and then helps auto-execute those tasks using AI. This includes updating CRM, sending follow-up emails, scheduling follow-up meetings, researching information, customizing collaterals (decks, one-pagers, RFPs), and much more. Sybill helps reps to close more while doing less. And we envision that Sybill will enable an AE to close 200% more revenue.

We have raised $15M to make this assistant of the future a reality for AEs. With 750+ happy customers, 70% of our revenue comes from word-of-mouth through our PLG offering.

We have a small and mighty team with some of the sharpest and most driven minds working together. We combine proprietary models and foundational LLMs to power our agentic technology, delivering highly accurate results.

Who Thrives at Sybill?

We're looking for people who:

 - Keep things moving and keep them simple: You value speed over perfection. You cut through complexity, focus on what matters, and keep raising the bar—every single day.

 - Care deeply about outcomes: You’re driven by real results. Not effort, not activity—impact. For our users, for the business, and for the team.

 - Collaborate like we're one team: You share the wins, step up to help, and know that none of us succeed unless all of us do.

 - Say the hard things, and stay open: You believe in honesty, transparency, and learning from every win and every mistake. Challenges don’t scare you—they push you to get creative.

 

The Opportunity

As the Head of Sales at Sybill, you will own and drive revenue growth across our mid-market and enterprise segments. You’ll be responsible for designing, executing, and continuously optimizing our sales strategy—not by managing people, but by leading from the front.

You’ll personally handle key deals, refine messaging and positioning through real-world feedback, and work cross-functionally to shape how Sybill is sold, scaled, and adopted across organizations. This role is for a high-performing individual contributor who thrives on execution, experimentation, and impact—not people management.

You’ll operate as a player-coach, a founder-level operator who builds repeatable systems by doing, learning, and iterating. You’ll help define how Sybill’s cutting-edge AI transforms how AEs sell.

 

What you’ll do:

 - Own the full sales funnel—from prospecting and qualification to negotiation and close—across mid-market and enterprise accounts.

 - Design and iterate on Sybill’s go-to-market, optimizing messaging, discovery, and deal cycles.

 - Consistently exceed targets while maintaining a rigorous, metrics-driven approach to forecasting and pipeline management.

 - Partner closely with the founders, marketing, product, and customer success to align GTM strategy, accelerate deal velocity, and identify new market opportunities.

 - Leverage AI tools (including Sybill itself) daily to scale your productivity, prospect smarter, and close faster.

 - Represent the voice of the customer internally, shaping product direction and positioning with real-time insights.

 

What we’re looking for:

 - 4+ years of experience in a closing role, with at least 2 years in SaaS sales.

 - Tenacious about winning deals - multithreading, flipping challenges into opportunities, and breaking through obstacles excites you.

 - Comfortable navigating uncertainty and ambiguity, proactively making strategic decisions, and ready to dive in at any level to drive results.

 - Passionate about the potential of AI in sales and an active user of tools like ChatGPT. You're resourceful, proactive, and adept at leveraging AI to streamline your day-to-day work.

 - Operate with high horsepow

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SYBILL.AI http://Sybill.ai

Sybill is a rapidly growing Series A startup transforming productivity for B2B sales teams. Traditional and modern sales tools bog down professionals with administrative tasks, distracting them from building relationships and closing deals. Our flagship feature, the Sybill Copilot, is an AI assistant deeply integrated into sales workflows that delivers comprehensive deal intelligence. It helps reps and managers instantly access insights, ask targeted questions, and make strategic decisions about meetings, deals, and accounts.

As we accelerate our growth, we're investing in exceptional talent to shape the future of sales intelligence. We're looking for an experienced, visionary product designer to join our team, collaborate with senior product leadership, and craft a compelling design vision that aligns with our ambitious strategy.




THE OPPORTUNITY

As a product designer, you'll combine hands-on work with strategic design leadership. You'll shape both our product's current experience and its future evolution. By owning the big picture and creating a design vision that aligns with our broader product strategy, you'll help excite customers about the future of sales intelligence. You'll play a key role in building a robust and influential design function within Sybill.

If you're passionate about using AI to enhance productivity and want to work with a smart, dedicated, innovative, and humble team, we'd love to hear from you!




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Hands-On Design Execution: Deliver high-quality designs throughout the product lifecycle, from ideation and wireframing to prototyping and polished user experiences.

 - Information Architecture: Elevate our product's information architecture to enhance clarity, intuitiveness, and user satisfaction.

 - User-Centric Research: Partner with Product to conduct meaningful user research, understand user behaviors, and translate insights into intuitive design decisions.

 - Collaborative Partnership: Work closely with Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success teams to iterate rapidly, validate ideas, and deliver outstanding user-centric designs.

 - Strategic Design Leadership: Partner with product management to translate Sybill's vision into an inspiring design strategy. Create compelling visuals that showcase this future to customers.




MINIMUM REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS


REQUIRED

 - Experience: 3+ years as a product designer, with significant B2B SaaS product design experience; startup experience highly preferred.

 - Design Expertise: Deep proficiency in UX/UI design, information architecture, and interaction design; strong portfolio showing successful solutions to complex problems.

 - Strategic Vision: Proven ability to develop high-level design vision aligned with product strategy, balanced with hands-on execution.

 - Ownership Mindset: Strong personal accountability, with initiative to drive business impact.

 - Mentorship & Leadership: Experience mentoring or managing designers, with excellent interpersonal and communication skills.


PREFERRED

 - AI & Generative AI: Experience designing for AI-driven products or strong familiarity with generative AI technologies.

 - Sales Empathy: Understanding of sales workflows and tools, with ability to empathize with sales teams' challenges and goals.




IMPACT YOU'LL MAKE

You'll shape not just how our product looks, but how it fundamentally works and evolves. Your strategic vision and hands-on leadership will directly influence our product roadmap, customer satisfaction, and company success.

You'll build something that thousands of sales professionals use daily to excel at their jobs, while creating design practices and systems that scale with our rapid growth.

source_jobs.title: Staff AI Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SYBILL:

At Sybill.ai http://Sybill.ai, we're building the next evolution in B2B sales – an AI-first platform that transforms how sellers work. Think of it as your intelligent sales IDE (Integrated Deal Environment), empowering sellers to focus on what truly matters: building relationships and closing deals.

Today, sellers spend 70% of their time on non-revenue activities. We're flipping this paradigm on its head. Sybill's AI lets sellers become super-performers who guide AI systems and focus on high-impact customer interactions.

Our proprietary AI technology, developed by a small but mighty team from Stanford, Harvard, and the IITs, and backed by leading investors in Silicon Valley, is not just another tool; it serves as the foundation of a groundbreaking sales workflow that delivers exceptional outcomes for our users. With 99%+ retention and 20x growth to 850 paying companies last year, our customers' enthusiasm speaks for itself.




THE OPPORTUNITY:

As a Staff AI Researcher, you'll architect and implement sophisticated agents and retrieval techniques that work across XX Million data points for every sales organization to power our sales co-pilot, making it feel like every seller has a seasoned sales mentor by their side. You'll drive continuous innovation by incorporating cutting-edge AI advancements, running rapid experiments, and iterating based on real user feedback to create truly magical experiences for our users.




WHO YOU ARE:

 - Deep experience architecting end-to-end AI systems that combine multiple components; LLMs, hybrid search indexes (lexical, vector, and knowledge graphs) and agents

 - Track record of optimizing retrieval systems for both accuracy and performance at scale

 - Data-driven mindset with experience in designing metrics and evaluation frameworks for AI systems

 - Strong software engineering foundation with expertise in Python and modern AI/ML infrastructure

 - Strong user empathy and collaboration skills with the ability to work across product, engineering, and customer-facing teams




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

 - Architect end-to-end agentic systems that autonomously plan and orchestrate multi-tool workflows

 - Implement sophisticated retrieval systems that surface contextually relevant information in near real-time

 - Optimize and fine tune our vector databases and embeddings to solve for accurate domain understanding

 - Drive technical decisions and collaborate with product to build AI features that solve real user pain point

 - Build monitoring systems to track model performance, costs, and reliability metrics

 - Stay on top of the latest developments in AI and rapidly prototype new capabilities

 - Use modern developer tools like Cursor and CoPilot to maximize productivity
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS:

 - 5+ years of AI research experience, with at least 2 years focused on RAG and AI copilot systems

 - Strong proficiency in modern AI infrastructure - vector databases, embedding models, agentic workflows (LangGraph, MCP etc.)

 - Advanced degree (MS/PhD) in Computer Science or related fields strongly preferred




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - AI Innovation Playground: Transform cutting-edge AI concepts into magical experiences

 - Direct Impact at Scale: Your AI systems will transform how thousands of sellers work, directly driving our 20x growth

 - Rapid Innovation Cycles: See your AI experiments go from idea to production in weeks, not years

 - Engineering Excellence: Build on our battle-tested AI and data infrastructure while pushing the boundaries of what's possible

 - Competitive compensation: $240,000 - $280,000 + equity in a rapidly growing startup + comprehensive Health/Dental/Vision insurance



Our commitment to you: We believe Sybill should be your biggest career accelerant yet. We'll deliver on this by tackling hard problems together, giving you real ownership, and pushing you to grow beyond your comfort zone. If you're ready to match this ambition with your own drive, we

source_jobs.title: Your Next Role
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SYBILL:

B2B AEs spend only 1.5 hours a day on customer calls—the rest is wasted in back-office admin work. Sybill automates away this drudgery, empowering sales reps to focus on what matters most: building relationships and closing deals.

We don't just take meeting notes—Sybill automatically creates and manages to-do lists from both calls and emails and then helps auto-execute those tasks using AI. This includes updating CRM, sending follow-up emails, scheduling follow-up meetings, researching information, customizing collaterals (decks, one-pagers, RFPs), and much more. Sybill helps reps to close more while doing less. And we envision that Sybill will enable an AE to close 200% more revenue.

We have raised $15M to make this assistant of the future a reality for AEs. With 750+ happy customers, 70% of our revenue comes from word-of-mouth through our PLG offering.

We have a small and mighty team with some of the sharpest and most driven minds working together. We combine proprietary models and foundational LLMs to power our agentic technology, delivering highly accurate results.




WHO THRIVES AT SYBILL?

We're looking for people who:

 - Keep things moving and keep them simple: You value speed over perfection. You cut through complexity, focus on what matters, and keep raising the bar—every single day.

 - Care deeply about outcomes: You're driven by real results. Not effort, not activity-impact. For our users, for the business, and for the team.

 - Collaborate like we're one team: You share the wins, step up to help, and know that none of us succeed unless all of us do.

 - Say the hard things, and stay open: You believe in honesty, transparency, and learning from every win and every mistake. Challenges don't scare you—they push you to get creative.
   
   


THE OPPORTUNITY

Can't find the perfect role but know you belong at Sybill? We want to hear from you.

At Sybill, we believe extraordinary people create extraordinary opportunities. If you're passionate about revolutionizing how B2B sales teams work, obsessed with AI's potential to transform entire industries, and ready to make a massive impact at a fast-growing startup, this is your chance to join us, even if there isn't a "perfect" role posted right now.

We're building the future of sales automation, and we need game-changers who can help us get there faster. Whether you're a sales powerhouse, a product visionary, a marketing genius, an engineering wizard, or bring skills we haven't even thought of yet, if you're driven, adaptable, and entrepreneurial, we want to talk.

You'll be surrounded by a team that brings enthusiasm, creativity, and relentless drive to solve the biggest problems in the lives of B2B sellers today. This isn't just a job, it's your opportunity to help build something that will fundamentally change how millions of salespeople work.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

The Non-Negotiables:

 - Unstoppable drive: You don't just want a job, you want to build something incredible and won't stop until you do.

 - AI enthusiast: You're genuinely excited about AI's potential and actively use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI platforms in your work.

 - Comfort with ambiguity: You thrive in fast-paced, uncertain environments where you need to figure things out as you go.

 - High horsepower: You operate at lightning speed, solve problems creatively, and manage multiple priorities without missing a beat.

 - Growth mindset: You learn rapidly, iterate constantly, and adapt to whatever the market throws at you.

 - Team player: You're honest, transparent, collaborative, and believe that everyone wins when the team wins.
   

Bonus Points If You Have:

 - Experience in SaaS, sales, marketing, product, engineering, or customer success

 - Background at fast-growing startups or high-growth companies

 - Track record of exceeding targets or delivering exceptional results

 - Experience building processes, systems, or teams from the ground up

 - Deep und

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT http://sybill.aiSYBILL.AI http://Sybill.ai

Sybill is a rapidly growing Series A startup transforming productivity for B2B sales teams. Traditional and modern sales tools bog down professionals with administrative tasks, distracting them from building relationships and closing deals. Our flagship feature, the Sybill Copilot, is an AI assistant deeply integrated into sales workflows that delivers comprehensive deal intelligence. It helps reps and managers instantly access insights, ask targeted questions, and make strategic decisions about meetings, deals, and accounts.

As we accelerate our growth, we're investing in exceptional talent to shape the future of sales intelligence. We're looking for an experienced, visionary product designer to join our team, collaborate with senior product leadership, and craft a compelling design vision that aligns with our ambitious strategy.

Role Overview

We're looking for a Growth Lead to help Sybill accelerate on the back of our momentum and fast evolving product roadmap.

You'll own how Sybill shows up online across platforms and help turn attention into real momentum. You’re a curious, data-driven, and energetic marketer who’s excited to join a fast-growing, early-stage startup in a career-defining role.

What You’ll Do

 - Grow and engage our audience – Build and execute programs to attract and nurture a loyal following across social media, email, and other channels.

 - Develop a winning social strategy – Increase Sybill’s brand presence and grow the followings of key internal influencers.

 - Experiment with new channels – Identify, test, and scale new organic growth marketing strategies. Run experiments across content, community, creators, and partnerships.

 - Measure and optimize – Use data to track what’s working, double down on successes, and iterate on campaigns quickly.

 - Amplify product and thought leadership – Work with the product marketing team to expand the reach of product launches and key messaging.

 - Leverage our customer base – Engage current users and turn them into brand advocates.

 - Elevate web presence via SEO, review boards, partnerships, and clear differentiation from competitors.

 - Collaborate across teams – Partner with demand generation, product, design, and leadership to align marketing efforts with business goals.

What We’re Looking For

 - 5+ years of growth marketing or demand generation experience in a high-growth B2B SaaSenvironment. Experience with product-assisted GTM and product growth tactics is helpful.

 - Strong social instincts and an active presence online. You understand how distribution works and how to grow attention across platforms.

 - A track record of building and growing audiences on social media, email, communities, or other channels.

 - Creative thinker, deeply curious, with a test-and-learn mindset – You’re excited to try new ideas and aren’t afraid to fail fast and iterate.

 - Strong analytical skills – You love diving into data to uncover insights and make smart decisions.

 - Hands-on AI experience – You’re comfortable and excited to bring AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and others to enhance marketing efforts.

 - Automation expertise – You know how to use tools like Zapier, Make, and Clay to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.

 - Excellent communication skills – You can craft compelling content and messaging that resonates with different audiences.


IMPACT YOU'LL MAKE

You'll shape not just how our product looks, but how it fundamentally works and evolves. Your strategic vision and hands-on leadership will directly influence our product roadmap, customer satisfaction, and company success.

You'll build something that thousands of sales professionals use daily to excel at their jobs, while creating design practices and systems that scale with our rapid growth.

notes: Sybill AI is a Series A startup with a focus on AI-powered sales productivity tools.
